tweets.text: Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/g4htNzvBTI. https://t.co/wrbq9LzZEg
The @WashFellowship Summit is taking place July 31-August 2 in Washington, bringing together fellows to build foundations for long-term partnerships – and friendships.  https://t.co/Q69BiEvg2T

#WorldRangerDay was established to honor fallen rangers. The U.S. recognizes the critical work of rangers in protecting the world’s nature and is proud to improve ranger safety through support for training, supplies, and novel technologies in protected areas around the world. https://t.co/COtkFCDwjj

In “The Week at State,” we take you to the Women's World Cup, @SecBlinken travels to Tonga, New Zealand, and Australia, @FLOTUS joins a ceremony celebrating the U.S.’s return to @UNESCO, and we thank @DeputySecState Sherman for her service. More at: https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/VSnjYcdTYf

.@SecBlinken: The objective that President Putin set in Ukraine was to erase it from the map, to eliminate its independence, to subsume it into Russia. That failed a long time ago. https://t.co/XTFf3gJhdt
On this #WorldDayAgainstTraffickingInPersons and every day, the U.S. is working with partners to create a world where no one is left behind. #EndHumanTrafficking https://t.co/Lwxw6LDVuJ

Air quality is an issue that impacts everyone. Learn how our Global Air Quality Fellows are applying lessons learned in the U.S. to protect the health of personnel abroad and promote solutions at the local level. 
https://t.co/4Vwojqkicx

Ukrainian farmers, like Volodymyr, are working to ensure that Ukrainian agriculture feeds the world, even as their country faces war and uncertainty. Everyone benefits from the Black Sea Grain Initiative. https://t.co/8H2vUvLbyB

The United States is a leader in the fight against wildlife trafficking. We take a whole-of-government approach to strengthen law enforcement, reduce demand for illegal wildlife products, and build international cooperation to combat wildlife trafficking. #WorldTigerDay https://t.co/dKpjdXvQQi

Watch now! @SecBlinken, Australian Foreign Minister @SenatorWong, @SecDef, and Australian Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Defence @RichardMarlesMP hold a joint press conference from Brisbane, Australia. https://t.co/fhkaxUZYuW

Our shared vision for the Indo-Pacific:
✅ Countries are free to choose their own paths and their own partners
✅ Problems are dealt with openly
✅ Rules are reached transparently and implemented fairly
✅ People, goods, and ideas are able to move about lawfully and freely
.@SecBlinken spoke about the importance of sports in promoting inclusion, on and off the field. https://t.co/v91ezO9wwk

Our “America the Beautiful” initiative is making progress on the goal to conserve 30 percent of U.S. lands and waters by 2030. The United States is committed to working with nations around the world. #ForNature https://t.co/SSDegLuTXD https://t.co/fian2YqTVZ

The U.S. looks forward to advancing nuclear nonproliferation, disarmament, and access to peaceful uses at the #NPT PrepCom, which begins Monday in Vienna. Read thoughts from @USNPT Scheinman in the DipNote: https://t.co/y26gtTVnyD. https://t.co/nynQG5Mi10
Watch now! @SecBlinken and New Zealand Foreign Minister @NanaiaMahuta hold a joint press availability in Wellington, New Zealand. https://t.co/1NfrnkAp37
Watch now! @SecBlinken and Tongan Prime Minister Hu’akavameiliku host a press availability in Nuku’alofa, Tonga. https://t.co/EisML1rlSX
Welcome to the Artemis Accords, Argentina! Together, Artemis Accords nations are building the collaborative future of space exploration.  https://t.co/97JMHbm7jP

The U.S.-Australia relationship is underpinned by shared democratic values and common interests, with strong economic, academic, and people-to-people ties. Our partnership promotes peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific region and around the world. https://t.co/h1dODUADCG https://t.co/bNfW5CHk7V

U.S. and Australian forces have fought side-by-side for more than one hundred years, in every major conflict since World War I. We also share a strong interest in maintaining freedom of navigation, overflight, and other lawful uses of the sea, including in the South China Sea. https://t.co/DOO0o6KgBm
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/idhHKDODtD. https://t.co/KWEgbzjyk6

On #NationalInternDay, we're celebrating our amazing interns and spreading the word about all of the opportunities available. Whether it’s at U.S. embassies and consulates throughout the world, in Washington, D.C., or even virtually – you can join our team. https://t.co/dE7TS3bgbG

Established as the first executive agency on July 27, 1789, to lead our nation’s foreign policy, 234 years later the State Department continues our mission of promoting democratic values and protecting the interests of American people around the world. https://t.co/sbPhWQudAS

Ever wanted to know what it is like to do business in another country but don’t know where to look? The Department’s Investment Climate Statements help businesses navigate international markets and make informed decisions about where to expand and invest. https://t.co/wuyIfAtsbV

The United States and New Zealand share common elements of history and culture and a commitment to democratic principles and the international rules-based order. Our countries are committed to continued close political, economic, and social ties. https://t.co/RkIPzRmnr0 https://t.co/6B2g1PsEvF

U.S. people-to-people programming in New Zealand focuses on: strengthening Indo-Pacific security partnerships; combating climate change; connecting U.S. indigenous and Māori and Pacific Island communities; and championing our common democratic values in the region. https://t.co/XE30mpPNAY

These fans couldn't have said it better. @FIFAWWC demonstrates unity and the world coming together. Our @USWNT players are amazing role models and examples of excellence. Thanks for making us proud! #WeBelieve https://t.co/jAXcnnmqi8
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/txvu7H5il4. https://t.co/jX3hOqAMVq

The United States recently opened a new embassy in Nuku‘alofa, less than one year after @VP announced that the United States would begin discussions with Tonga regarding its interest in establishing an embassy there. https://t.co/MEHwSnGnNB

As we mark the 33rd anniversary of the Americans with Disabilities Act, we highlight how the law has led to a more equitable, accessible, and inclusive world. Explore our interactive story for more. https://t.co/LvGCEHq2uM

The Americans with Disabilities Act is a landmark law that promotes inclusion and access for disabled Americans and has served as a model around the world. On the 33rd anniversary of the ADA, we celebrate its advocates and recognize the work still needed to realize its promise. https://t.co/vH5U4R0urL

The United States and Tonga are cooperating closely on matters ranging from combating the climate crisis to improving maritime security and fostering cooperation and development in the Indo-Pacific region. https://t.co/fqhQEPwbox https://t.co/1DayTFdK5H

The U.S. has rejoined @UNESCO. Did you know we have 24 World Heritage sites and have supported the preservation of other World Heritage sites around the world through the U.S. Ambassadors Fund for Cultural Preservation? What World Heritage sites have you visited? https://t.co/LxNeOOyLf6

Today @FLOTUS joined a flag raising ceremony to celebrate the return of the United States to @UNESCO. The ceremony honors the reaffirmation of the U.S. commitment to global collaboration on education, culture, and science, as it rejoins UNESCO's diverse community of nations. https://t.co/vVCgqw70DZ

.@StateDeputySpox: As home to leading AI companies in the world, the United States is uniquely positioned to lead the way in creating an AI future we all can benefit from. https://t.co/YEy6YkQgr2 https://t.co/HkZJH3WXQn
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/WVDcRXpADl. https://t.co/hYupibV6d0
Live now: @FLOTUS participates in a U.S. flag raising ceremony at @UNESCO Headquarters in Paris, France to mark the United States rejoining the organization. https://t.co/nMfGo1B5aN

You don't need to live near a U.S. embassy or in Washington, DC to intern at the State Department! U.S. citizen students enrolled at least half-time in college can apply for Virtual Student Federal Service internships by July 31. Learn more: https://t.co/fEr44ZxChG. https://t.co/2xAc35l9Ie

.@SecBlinken: We will not only help Ukraine rebuild its economy, but reimagine it, with new industries, trade routes, and supply chains connected with Europe and other markets around the world. https://t.co/tVqM54vsZh

.@StateDeptSpox condemns Russia’s attacks: Over the weekend, we saw appalling images of burning churches and flattened residential buildings. Today, Russia attacked grain warehouses on the Danube River. The consequences of Russia’s attacks on Ukraine have never been more clear. https://t.co/vKQWmqP0Cy
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/yzD3AhOuSJ. https://t.co/lLdMVauyri

During the first visit of a U.S. Secretary of State to Tonga, @SecBlinken will participate in a dedication ceremony for U.S. Embassy Nukuʻalofa. The Embassy, which opened in May, is a symbol of our commitment to a shared future with the people of Tonga. 
https://t.co/Nn6UXL6kYP

In “The Week at State,” @SecBlinken hosts a forum on the synthetic drug crisis and later participates in the @AspenSecurity Forum, while @ClimateEnvoy Kerry travels to China to discuss the climate crisis. For more updates, subscribe at: https://t.co/2sMdDghXvf https://t.co/iYVUC6c08T

.@SecBlinken: And the U.S. moved swiftly, decisively, and in unison with allies and partners to do exactly what we said we’d do: support Ukraine, impose costs on Russia, strengthen NATO – all of this with our allies and partners. https://t.co/1t9TV1lPXQ

Read the latest on how the United States and partners remain #UnitedWithUkraine, including support for recovery, the Black Sea Grain Initiative, and the everyday heroes in Ukraine. https://t.co/k67GZhr093
.@SecBlinken: We want to make sure that AI maximizes its potential for the extraordinary good that it can do around the world. Full remarks: https://t.co/hP73A9LDdc
Thinking about traveling abroad? Before confirming your travel plans, review the travel advisory for your destination at https://t.co/yR0YJrGtYg. #TravelSmartFromtheStart https://t.co/jbkeggBjZj

Soccer’s popularity has soared in the U.S. and the U.S. Women’s National Team is a major reason why. Read about the team’s outsized influence on U.S. soccer as the @USWNT look to win their third straight World Cup in Australia and New Zealand. https://t.co/vYCFtSmHsW
Let’s go @uswnt! Fans across the country and around the world are cheering you on as you defend the title. It is #AlwaysPossible and you are #BeyondGreatness.

.@SecBlinken at the #AspenSecurity Forum: Every place I go, people see the United States doing what's necessary to strengthen ourselves at home, to sharpen our competitiveness to make sure that we are a leading country going forward into the 21st century. https://t.co/i4tTSg2vi1

Live Now! @SecBlinken participates in an @AspenSecurity Forum moderated by @NBCNews Chief Washington Correspondent and Chief Foreign Affairs Correspondent @mitchellreports in Colorado. Watch live here and https://t.co/oY2PaOyz3D. https://t.co/N1GNUGG5e4
Are you ready for the Women's World Cup? @fifawwc has kicked off and the @USWNT is looking to add a fifth star to their jerseys. #BeyondGreatness
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/cRtwsH9ScR. https://t.co/rpULqr2ntS

#InternationalMoonDay marks the anniversary of Apollo 11 and the first human landing on the surface of the Moon. We are thrilled to watch the progress of @NASA's Artemis program which brings together international partners as we return to the Moon and advance space science.

State Department internships are paid, give students the opportunity to explore @DOSCareers, and promote greater socio-economic diversity. Hear from Viviana Gonzalez, a recent intern, on how modernized internships are opening new career doors: https://t.co/6vdyF8bFSb
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/wLBGx0vjfL https://t.co/rIFCNOl8RH

When a free people like the Ukrainians have at their backs the support of free nations around the world – nations who recognize their fates and freedoms, their rights and security are inextricably bound together – the force they possess is not merely immense. It is unstoppable. https://t.co/ouTWFrDzlk

.@StateDeptSpox: Yesterday Russia suspended its participation in the Black Sea Grain Initiative. For the millions who depend on Ukrainian grain to feed their families, we urge the Government of Russia to reverse its decision & to extend, expand & fully implement the initiative. https://t.co/hpnWFurquQ
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/4aCQcTAxOi. https://t.co/3DRrSleRH2

The @WashFellowship for Young African Leaders brings together emerging leaders who are making a positive impact in their communities and countries. Visit https://t.co/Q69BiEvg2T
for more. #MandelaDay

Nelson Mandela devoted his life to the service of humanity and fighting for equality. Today on #MandelaDay, we honor and remember his legacy, which lives on far beyond the borders of South Africa. https://t.co/fhKYo7bTfk

Read the latest on how the United States and partners remain #UnitedWithUkraine, including support for recovery, the Black Sea Grain Initiative, and the everyday heroes in Ukraine. https://t.co/k67GZhr093

.@SecBlinken: "We will issue more passports this year than in any previous year. But that's just a reflection of the fact that demand is higher than it's ever been. And we're throwing everything we can at this, trying to make sure that people...are able to travel." https://t.co/0H4fQQJRdm

.@SecBlinken on the Black Sea Grain Initiative: The result of Russia’s action today, weaponizing food, using it as a tool as a weapon in its war against Ukraine, will be to make food harder to come by in places that desperately need it. https://t.co/SyoDUnZJGD
Live now! @SecBlinken delivers remarks to the press from the press briefing room at the State Department. Also streaming at: https://t.co/uoS8HJnSRC  https://t.co/TCwHJkr6Tw
This week, @SecBlinken reaffirmed the United States' commitment to ASEAN and to the U.S.-Indonesian partnership. https://t.co/5OmLhDvmth

In “The Week at State,” @SecBlinken launches the Global Coalition to Address Synthetic Drug Threats, joins @POTUS for the @NATO Summit in Lithuania, and travels to Indonesia for the @ASEAN Regional Forum. For the latest, visit https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/IvlXgRgBtt

.@StateGWI's Innovation Station initiative, which amplifies the efforts of women and girls developing solutions to climate-related community challenges, is celebrating its two-year anniversary! Read about the initiative's impact: https://t.co/6dHSPUw1Za

.@POTUS at the @NATO summit in Vilnius: Putin is making a bad bet that the conviction and the unity among the U.S. and our Allies and partners will break down. He doesn’t understand that our commitment to our values, our freedom is something we can never walk away from. https://t.co/QSthic177e

.@POTUS highlighted how the U.S. – alongside our allies and partners – is supporting Ukraine, defending democratic values, and taking action to address global challenges. Read full remarks here: https://t.co/hX9XL5snn3 https://t.co/QTnYtLi1pP

Ukrainian farmers, like Volodymyr, are working to ensure that Ukrainian agriculture feeds the world, even as their country faces war and uncertainty. Everyone benefits from the Black Sea Grain Initiative. https://t.co/sRN0fuldfS
There is an urgent need to extend and expand the Black Sea Grain Initiative to ensure ships are able to access Ukraine’s ports so more food can get to global markets. https://t.co/jjkTHxIhd4

Listen to Yuri, the son of a Ukrainian farmer: Supporting Ukrainian farmers and the Black Sea Grain Initiative not only benefits farmers’ families and communities, but contributes to the overall wellbeing of Ukraine and the global economy. https://t.co/XxbtwmCvgx

At a press availability in Jakarta, @SecBlinken discusses U.S.- @ASEAN relations and our shared vision of a free, open, prosperous, secure, interconnected, and resilient Indo-Pacific. https://t.co/cC1vk3GqiY

The U.S.-ASEAN relationship creates jobs on both sides of the Pacific. More than 6,200 U.S. companies operate across @ASEAN's member states, employing nearly 1 million people, and all 50 U.S. states export to ASEAN, supporting more than 625,000 U.S. jobs. https://t.co/EbzTpR5kqD https://t.co/i8L1Lp1wmx
Live now! @SecBlinken holds a press availability in Jakarta, Indonesia. Also streaming at https://t.co/3Pqi4k4C8r.  https://t.co/CGShsMdBgR

.@POTUS: Faced with a threat to the peace and stability of the world, to democratic values we hold dear, to freedom itself, we did what we always do: The United States stepped up. NATO stepped up. https://t.co/4ueUfW0K9F
Did you know? ASEAN represents the world’s fourth-largest market, and the United States is ASEAN’s largest source of foreign direct investment. https://t.co/YS2N0Qm6YF
The G7 Joint Declaration of Support for Ukraine is a powerful statement of our commitment to Ukraine as it defends its freedom and rebuilds its future. https://t.co/EdFjePc7Ef https://t.co/4nGMBUMMky

The United States and @ASEAN are celebrating 46 years of partnership and together are continuing to expand on initiatives that enhance prosperity and security in the region. Here’s how: https://t.co/EbzTpR5Sgb. https://t.co/GDwTQrxOMg

.@POTUS: In this moment of great global challenges — from global inflation, to the climate crisis, to Russia’s brutal war against Ukraine — we’re bringing together the broadest possible coalition of partners to deliver results. https://t.co/8VfoiSIaqD
Quality education is the foundation for improving people’s lives and for sustainable development. We thank Malala for her continued fight for girl’s education globally. #MalalaDay
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/8fToYbMiqw. https://t.co/xFImH8XTBO

Thirty-one nations between North America and Europe share a mission to protect the freedom and security of our allies and ensure their peace and prosperity. The U.S. commitment to @NATO and its mission is ironclad. https://t.co/3ZMAWjRkBI

As leaders from the U.S., Europe, and North America gather in Lithuania for a @NATO summit, learn what every U.S. president since Harry S. Truman has said about this important organization: https://t.co/seL8jr5EMt

NATO protects more than 1 billion people in Europe and North America from 21st-century threats from cybercrime to pandemics. Learn more about @NATO's  role as leaders meet in Lithuania for a NATO summit this week:
https://t.co/Z7zNuSV41X
.@StateDeptSpox: One of the United States’ top priorities has been to defend and strengthen the @NATO Alliance and we will continue to take steps to do so. https://t.co/pU11ZT7Mz4
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/L7OgRghSy2. https://t.co/hlbdITd7t2

Today, @ECAatState launched a regional summit for the Academy for Women Entrepreneurs in East Africa, bringing 100 #ExchangeAlumni for interactive workshops on business sustainability and networking sessions to advance women-led business across the region. https://t.co/OOmMeAhCjg

.@POTUS: We see all too clearly how NATO remains an indispensable alliance for the world of today and the world of tomorrow. Our Alliance is closer than ever. It is more united than ever. https://t.co/DYU6zYsZen

This week, @NATO leaders will gather in Vilnius. In our latest blog, @StateDepPM explains how alliances like NATO & other global partnerships are key to upholding stability and prosperity, addressing shared challenges, and reinforcing international norms. https://t.co/BfhAjYHDyK

.@StateDeptSpox: The international community has rallied around Ukraine in the face of Moscow’s flagrant violations of the @UN Charter and attempts to conquer its neighbor and redraw internationally recognized borders by force. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/okygetspvN
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/THNg8Hna4c. https://t.co/NQgIfFvaNJ

.@NATO marked its 74th anniversary this year on April 4, the Alliance can claim a record of remarkable achievements since its founding in 1949. Read about this uniquely adaptive alliance:
https://t.co/tOJadRmYCp.

.@SecBlinken: @NATO Allies are committed to enhanced deterrence and defense, to greater and smarter defense spending, to deeper ties with Indo-Pacific partners. NATO’s door remains open to new members, and it will stay open. https://t.co/vhyle3xCat

“As Russia continues to destroy, we are here to help Ukraine rebuild — rebuild lives, rebuild its country, rebuild its future,” - @SecBlinken during the Ukraine Recovery Conference. Read about how countries and others are supporting Ukraine’s recovery: https://t.co/JmtM41K4J2.

The United States and countries around the world support Ukraine as it defends itself against Russia’s brutal full-scale ​invasion. One of the ways we support Ukraine is through sanctions on Russia, which have weakened the Kremlin’s ability to wage its illegal war. https://t.co/re5oVNv3Sz
.@POTUS: “The United States continues to do all we can to strengthen Ukraine’s ability to defend itself.” https://t.co/Rc461srNN6
500 days of Russia’s war of aggression. Ukrainian forces have valiantly defended their sovereignty and freedom. We stand #UnitedWithUkraine. https://t.co/OmqraLLFwH
The @WelcomeCorps is expanding! Learn more about how U.S. colleges and universities are standing #WithRefugees and how you can get involved: https://t.co/Eukto9hwdb

Our programs are enabling independent observation of elections worldwide.  In The Gambia, @StateDRL partners with local organizations to strengthen citizen engagement and participation in democratic processes, including through election observation. More: https://t.co/3cXkFa81aF

Opioids remain the most lethal group of drugs. Illicit fentanyl, a synthetic opioid, can be 50 times stronger than heroin. The U.S. is leading a coordinated global effort with international partners to disrupt the illicit synthetic drug trade. Learn more: https://t.co/DHzqcfU7vg

Illicitly-manufactured synthetic drugs threaten the health, security, and wellbeing of people around the world. Learn more about how the U.S. and the Global Coalition to Address Synthetic Drug Threats will work to combat this issue: https://t.co/XdYRoHcKQQ

Live now! .@SecBlinken delivers closing remarks at a virtual Ministerial meeting to launch the Global Coalition to Address Synthetic Drug Threats. Also streaming at  https://t.co/4yBTu8jQVF https://t.co/JwZHJsP7g2
.@SecBlinken outlines the health and security threats posed by synthetic drugs at the launch of the Global Coalition to Address Synthetic Drug Threats. https://t.co/7HyP0Jpb4v

Live now! @SecBlinken delivers opening remarks at a virtual Ministerial meeting to launch the Global Coalition to Address Synthetic Drug Threats. Also streaming at https://t.co/Gow2aEJhNK. https://t.co/JXbf1bPgBt

.@SecBlinken in Guyana: We greatly value the leadership of Caribbean nations on our shared priorities: strengthening democracy in the Americas, addressing the global climate crisis, creating even greater & more inclusive economic opportunity for our people.https://t.co/NUviw8Q8iJ

The United States partners with Guyana to achieve shared clean energy goals, most notably maintaining their status as a carbon sink, thanks to the critical role of their forests. https://t.co/sATsQ9o54I https://t.co/nXvhpry5Gj

The U.S. government will launch a new food security program in the Eastern and Southern Caribbean region, designed in collaboration with Caribbean governments, with $5.3 million in food security assistance to address food security challenges. https://t.co/sATsQ9oCUg
.@SecBlinken: We in the United States strongly support the Haitian people in this very challenging time. We stand with them. https://t.co/05ZrTC9SbE https://t.co/elhSwYdIm1
Live now! @SecBlinken holds a joint press availability with Guyanese President Irfaan Ali, also streaming at https://t.co/gRDFwo0u20. https://t.co/bWs4bSGczc

The Black Sea Grain Initiative has delivered more than 32 million metric tons of grain from Ukraine to global markets, contributing to lower global food prices. Read about this critical deal brokered by Türkiye and the @UN last year: https://t.co/2Q4KNYkosi

Russia halts and delays grain shipments sometimes for months. This gross violation of the Black Sea Grain Initiative puts millions of the most vulnerable people at risk of food shortages. Russia must abide by and extend the Black Sea Grain Initiative. https://t.co/vJHwf3N4lK

In 2022, total trade between our two countries topped $9 billion dollars, with nearly $1 billion in Trinbagonian exports entering the United States with preferential, duty-free access under the Caribbean Basin Initiative. https://t.co/rSBSyul2YW https://t.co/zoeL3Ka5dY

.@VP launched PACC 2030 to work with the Caribbean to support efforts to unlock new financing for clean energy projects and build up resilience in the face of the multiplying challenges presented by climate change. https://t.co/frRSt3RJKQ

Partnerships are essential to the success of global anti-trafficking efforts. Government and civil society stakeholders continue to work together to strengthen prosecution, protection, and prevention efforts to #EndHumanTrafficking. More from @JTIP_State: https://t.co/FlzQtQYy8z

Every Fourth of July, millions of people across the United States celebrate America’s Independence Day with fireworks, parades and cookouts.  Other countries also celebrate the day with American music, food and culture. Learn more: https://t.co/a2Bc1PJJ3V

Every year U.S. Embassies and Consulates celebrate America’s birthday with their host countries. We’re highlighting a few of our favorite photos from around the world. Happy Fourth of July! https://t.co/LWYP7NGKaR
Happy U.S. Independence Day! Today, we celebrate our freedom and liberty. https://t.co/wwk1Hm7Wfw

Innovative exchanges, like @ECAatState's A Global Moment in Time @StateIVLP initiative, connect international changemakers with like-minded Americans and help us address societal issues affecting us all. Read more about the #IVLPGlobalMoment initiative: https://t.co/xvEGJxvBfU

When a free people like the Ukrainians have at their backs the support of free nations around the world – nations who recognize their fates and freedoms, their rights and security are inextricably bound together – the force they possess is not merely immense. It is unstoppable. https://t.co/Q3PBOsmxEi

Putin’s war of aggression against Ukraine has been a strategic failure. Russia is worse off now than it was before its full-scale invasion of Ukraine — militarily, economically, and geopolitically. https://t.co/UJUM2cOKBq

The destruction of Nova Kakhovka dam destroyed entire villages and left thousands of Ukrainians in need of aid & evacuation. Russian forces are reportedly firing at fleeing Ukrainians. Despite the Kremlin's brutal tactics, Ukrainians will prevail. We remain #UnitedWithUkraine. https://t.co/PMO0uuBo9I

In “The Week at State,” @SecBlinken travels to New York City and takes part in a conversation on U.S. foreign policy with @CFR_org. He closes the week hosting a #PrideMonth reception at the State Department. For the latest, visit https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/r7XT5JAZsh

The United States works with Latin American and Caribbean countries to prepare for hurricanes. Here are 5 ways @USAID and partners are improving disaster resilience to save lives in the region: https://t.co/AGwkahdwgz.

Step up your travel game! Sign up for the free Smart Traveller Enrollment Program (STEP) to receive safety and security updates from the nearest U.S. embassy before and during your travel. Enroll at https://t.co/LUiIr82QaX. #TravelSmartFromtheStart https://t.co/tDY6MSlpZr

In the U.S. July is Disability Pride Month! This month marks the 1990 enactment of the Americans with Disabilities Act, which prohibits discrimination against people with disabilities in areas of public life & enables their full participation in society. https://t.co/7vkmyb4YwL

.@SecBlinken on the role of U.S. diplomacy: This is where we come in – where the State Department comes in – working not only to rejuvenate, to revive, and in some cases to reform our alliances and partnerships, but also to build some new ones. https://t.co/KAbrHm3NUi
